title: Etekcity Digital Body Weight Bathroom Scale with Step-On Technology, 400 Lb, Blue
description_text: Staying fit and healthy is just a step away. Simply stepping on the large tempered glass platform and receive immediate results displayed on a sizeable backlit LCD display. Sophisticated sensors ensure that your results are within 0.1 lbs. Of whatever is being weighed, ensuring accurate weight measurement time after time. Specification weight capacity: 180 kg (400 lbs) Graduation: 0.1lb / 0.05kg units: kg/ lbs platform: 6mm tempered glass auto-multifunction: low battery overload indication; auto on or off or zero LCD display: 3.1" Note: 1. Scale is placed on a hard, flat surface (tile, wood, etc.). If it is placed on something soft (such as carpet), it will not weigh accurately. 2. Keep your gravity in the center of the scale and your body stable while taking measurements. 3. Clear the scale: step on the scale until the display lights up, then step off until the scale shows "0.0." Do this each time you are measuring your weight. 4. Try weighing first thing in the morning (after using the restroom) and with minimal clothing to prevent deviation or skewed readings. 5. This scale was designed for measuring weights of at least 11 lb. For lighter objects, we suggest an Etekcity kitchen scale. 6.Package Information: 1 x Etekcity Body weight scale, 1 x QSG, 3 x 1.5V AAA batteries.
